description:
IF  cumulative charge throughput exceeds design cycle limit
THEN
  · BMS_SOHEstFault_Flag := 1
  · Trigger SOH re-calibration request

IF  BMS_HVILFault_Flag = 1
THEN
  · Open all main contactors within 100 ms
  · BMS_SystemState := SafeState

IF  measured isolation resistance < r_Insulation_MinThreshold
THEN
  · BMS_InsulationFault_Flag := 1
  · Open both main contactors

Upon BMS_CellOV_L3_Flag = 1:
  · Charge contactor shall open within 200 ms
  · Discharge contactor shall open within 100 ms of charge contactor Open
  · BMS_ChargeContactor_State := Open
  · BMS_DischargeContactor_State := Open

IF  any cell temperature <= low temperature limit
THEN
  · BMS_CellUT_Flag := 1
  · BMS_ChargeReady_Flag := 0 (charging prohibited)

Wake-up sources:
  · CAN bus activity
  · Dedicated wake-up pin
Wake-up shall complete initialisation within 500 ms and report BMS_SystemState on CAN.

IF  HV leakage current > safety threshold
THEN
  · BMS_HVLeakage_Flag := 1
  · Trigger audible warning via HMI

When BMS_SystemState = Standby AND no CAN activity for configurable timeout:
  · Enter low-power sleep mode
  · Quiescent current minimized
  · Wake-up capability shall be maintained (CAN, wake pin)

IF  CAN bus-off or excessive error passive detected
THEN
  · BMS_CANFault_Flag := 1
  · Enter limp-home mode (discharge power <= 30 %)
  · BMS_SafeState_Entry := 1

Upon VCU_HVDisconnect_Req or critical fault:
  · Open both main contactors
  · Discharge DC link capacitance
  · BMS_SystemState := HV_Deactivating
  · THEN Standby or SafeState as appropriate

Upon BMS_CellOV_Flag = 1, the BMS shall:
  · Broadcast BMS_CellOV_Warn = 1 on CAN ID 0x180 at 100 ms periodicity
  · Reduce charge current target to 50 % of nominal

On VBAT application, the BMS shall:
  · Initialise all subsystems
  · Perform memory self-check
  · Load calibration parameters from NVM
  · Verify sensor communication
Upon successful initialisation: BMS_SystemState := Standby
The BMS shall monitor each cell voltage against the overvoltage threshold. BMS_CellOV_Detect shall be set to 1 when any cell voltage >= r_CellOV_Threshold.

While BMS_Fault_Latch = 1:
  · All contactor closure prohibited
  · Normal operation blocked until power cycle
  · Fault code readable via diagnostic interface

While BMS_SCD_Flag = 1:
  · BMS_SCD_Latch := 1 (persistent across power cycles)
  · BMS_SCD_Latch shall only clear via diagnostic command
  · HV contactor closure shall be prohibited while latched

IF  BMS_InsulationFault_Flag = 1 for >= 1 s
THEN
  · BMS_InsulationFault_Latch := 1
  · Store DTC in non-volatile memory
  · HV contactor closure disabled until diagnostic clear

After both BMS_ChargeOC_Flag = 0 and BMS_DischargeOC_Flag = 0:
  · Power limit shall be maintained for 2 s hold time
  · Power shall ramp back to nominal at max 10 % per second
  · A new overcurrent event during ramp shall reset the hold timer

IF  pack charge current exceeds 150 A
THEN
  · BMS_ChargeOC_Flag := 1
  · Limit charge current to 100 A within 50 ms

IF  min cell voltage <= 2.50 V
THEN
  · BMS_CellUV_L2_Flag := 1
  · Open discharge contactor
  · Prohibit further discharge until voltage recovers > 3.00 V

A charge session shall be terminated on any of the following conditions:
  · BMS_ChargeComplete_Flag = 1
  · BMS_ChargeTerm_Req = 1 (from section 1 overvoltage)
  · Any active fault requiring contactor open (sections 1-8)
  · Charger disconnected
